enrichment.summary: Kyle films a vlog from Boulder on a snowy February morning, showing his Google Earth mapping project of historic Boulder and discussing his plan to work on it all day. He also talks about his cannabis use (weed, shatter, wax concentrates) and mentions plans to make requested videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Most excited about this project of any he's worked on; sees it as a way to let people experience Boulder from another time
Thinks concentrates are bad for lungs and give him asthma; prefers regular weed
Always fulfills requests as long as the person asked with good intentions
Tries to maintain 100% response rate but admits one very long comment has gone unanswered for six months
